error.default_config_enabled: default_config is enabled in configuration.yaml. Unable to manage integrations.
error.advanced_warning: Advanced mode allows disabling default_config integrations. Use with caution.

data_description.mode_dropdown: Error: Default Config Manager is missing from config file. Add 'default_config_manager:' to configuration.yaml then restart. [More information.](https://github.com/earto/default_config_manager).
Error: Factory Default Config is enabled. Change 'default_config:' to 'default_config_manager:' in configuration.yaml then restart.
Error: Both 'default_config:' and 'default_config_manager:' are enabled. Remove 'default_config:' from configuration.yaml then restart.
Default Config Manager is managing integrations. For full control, switch to Advanced mode.

disclaimer.title: Advanced Mode Warning
disclaimer.description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** Advanced mode allows you to disable core components. Do your research as misconfiguration can break core functionality and affect integrations.

Please confirm if you want to proceed.

data.acknowledge: I understand the risks, enable Advanced Mode.

revert_basic.title: Revert to Managed Mode
revert_basic.description:
You are switching back to Basic Mode. Any disabled integrations will now be re-enabled.

Click Submit to confirm or X to cancel.

error.must_acknowledge: You must check the box to confirm you understand the risks before saving.

missing_yaml.title: Missing Configuration
missing_yaml.description: Please add 'default_config_manager:' to configuration.yaml and restart Home Assistant.

restart_required.title: Restart Required
restart_required.description: Changes to Default Config integrations have been detected. A restart is required for these changes to take effect.

confirm.title: Restart Home Assistant
confirm.description: Are you sure you want to restart to apply changes?
